DEPT_EXISTS: Department with this name already exists
ACTIVE_ASSETS_EXIST: Product has active assets, cannot be deleted
DEPT_HAS_USERS: Department has employees, cannot be deleted
DEPT_HAS_ASSETS: Department has assets, cannot be deleted
INVENTORY_QTY_REQUIRED: Exactly {quantity} inventory numbers must be sent for assets!
INVENTORY_DUPLICATES: There are duplicates among the entered inventory numbers!
INVENTORY_NUMBER_BUSY: One of the inventory numbers is already busy in the database: {number}
PRODUCT_IN_STOCK: Product is in stock, cannot be deleted
PRODUCT_IN_DEPTS: This product is in departments, cannot be deleted
